### Post by Neo_The_User on 2009-03-24
A battle between Super Cow Powers vs No Super Cow Powers.

I'll start. I have no idea what they both mean, therefor, I have no opinion.

### Post by RiceMonster on 2009-03-24
what

### Post by Neo_The_User on 2009-03-24
you know how aptitude has super cow powers? well.. yeah

---

### Post by lukjad on 2009-03-24
Oh. Well, I like both, and if I ever write my own program, I'll be sure to put something along those lines in there. ;)

---

### Post by Glucklich on 2009-03-24
Super Cow Powers, obviously.

---

### Post by kpatz on 2009-03-24
apt-get has Super Cow powers, while aptitude doesn't.

Try "apt-get moo" and "aptitude moo" and see what you get.

Then try "aptitude -v moo", and keep adding more v's and see what you get (e.g. aptitude -vv moo, etc.)

---

### Post by Neo_The_User on 2009-03-24
```

neo@neo-xubuntu:~$ apt-get moo
         (__) 
         (oo) 
   /------\/ 
  / |    ||   
 *  /\---/\ 
    ~~   ~~   
...."Have you mooed today?"...
neo@neo-xubuntu:~$ aptitude moo
There are no Easter Eggs in this program.
neo@neo-xubuntu:~$ aptitude -v moo
There really are no Easter Eggs in this program.
neo@neo-xubuntu:~$ aptitude -vv moo
Didn't I already tell you that there are no Easter Eggs in this program?
neo@neo-xubuntu:~$ aptitude -vvv moo
Stop it!
neo@neo-xubuntu:~$ aptitude -vvvv moo
Okay, okay, if I give you an Easter Egg, will you go away?
neo@neo-xubuntu:~$ aptitude -vvvvv moo
All right, you win.

                               /----\
                       -------/      \
                      /               \
                     /                |
   -----------------/                  --------\
   ----------------------------------------------
neo@neo-xubuntu:~$ aptitude -vvvvvv moo
What is it?  It's an elephant being eaten by a snake, of course.
neo@neo-xubuntu:~$ aptitude -vvvvvvv moo
What is it?  It's an elephant being eaten by a snake, of course.
neo@neo-xubuntu:~$ aptitude -vvvvvvvv moo
What is it?  It's an elephant being eaten by a snake, of course.
neo@neo-xubuntu:~$ aptitude -vvvvvvvvvvvvvvvvvvvv moo
What is it?  It's an elephant being eaten by a snake, of course.
neo@neo-xubuntu:~$ aptitude - moo
What is it?  It's an elephant being eaten by a snake, of course.

```

EPIC LULZ!

---
